overview: A comprehensive GenAI Voice Automation management dashboard for Signpost India. Covers inbound/outbound call management, lead CRM, campaign orchestration, analytics, billing, settings, and multi-channel communications (WhatsApp, SMS, Marketing) in a professional dark-themed B2B SaaS interface.
features: Overview dashboard with key metrics, sparklines, and activity feed
Call Management with inbound/outbound/missed call logs, intent detection, and detail views
Lead CRM with Hot/Warm/Cold status, follow-up scheduling, and interaction timeline
Campaign Management with create, manage, and performance tracking
Analytics & Performance with call volume charts, conversion funnel, and agent stats
Billing & Usage with minute tracking, overage calculation at ₹5/min, and invoice history
Settings for business hours, bot scripts/intents, and agent routing rules
Multi-channel Communications panel with WhatsApp, SMS, and Marketing tabs
